summary: Dimsum menu app with Porsian (5pcs), Party Pack 40pcs, and Party Pack 50pcs menu items. User is updating menu item pictures to match their respective dimsum quantities.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Overhead close-up food photo of 5 steamed dimsum dumplings arranged neatly on a bamboo steamer, warm appetizing lighting, clean background (porsian-menu.dim_600x400.png)
- Overhead close-up food photo of 40 steamed dimsum dumplings arranged in multiple bamboo steamers stacked together, warm appetizing lighting, festive abundance feel (party-pack-40pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png)
- Overhead close-up food photo of 50 steamed dimsum dumplings arranged in multiple bamboo steamers stacked together, warm appetizing lighting, festive abundance feel, slightly larger spread than 40pcs presentation (party-pack-50pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png)

existing_features.title: Update the Porsian menu item image to show 5 pieces of dimsum.
Update the Party Pack 40pcs menu item image to show 40 pieces of dimsum.
Update the Party Pack 50pcs menu item image to show 50 pieces of dimsum.

Render the three newly generated menu images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in Menu.tsx for the Porsian, Party Pack 40pcs, and Party Pack 50pcs menu cards respectively.
